summary: Monthly distributor billing two-entry system tested successfully. Backend returns all required fields (total_at_transfer_price, settlement_selling_price_adj, net_adjustment_amount, settlement_note_type). Frontend BillingTab correctly displays Entry 1 (Billing at Transfer Price) and Entry 2 (Settlement Adjustments) with proper labels and formulas.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_billing_two_entries.py - New test file for two-entry billing system

success_rate.backend: 100% - 16/16 tests passed, 1 skipped (no settlements to verify field)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - test distributor has no approved settlements for current period
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-entry billing system is working correctly. Backend endpoint GET /api/distributors/{id}/monthly-reconciliation returns: total_at_transfer_price (Entry 1), settlement_selling_price_adj (Entry 2 selling price adjustments), net_adjustment_amount, settlement_note_type. Frontend BillingTab reads these fields correctly. Empty state shows when no approved settlements exist.

verified: Response contains total_at_transfer_price field (Entry 1 - direct from settlement)
settlement_note_type logic: debit if net > 0, credit if net < 0, none if 0
Fallback: if total_at_transfer_price is 0 and billing > 0, compute from billing - earnings - factory_adj
Returns 400 when no approved unreconciled settlements exist
Settlement generation stores total_at_transfer_price = Sum(qty × transfer_price)
Field is accumulated from per-item billed_to_dist
Subtitle 'Billing at transfer price + Settlement adjustments (Debit/Credit Note)' visible
Month/Year selectors visible with data-testid attributes
Empty state shows 'No approved settlements for {month} {year}' correctly
Base Prices & Margins note with link to Margins tab visible
Entry 1: 'Total Billing at Transfer Price' label (line 204)
Entry 1: 'qty x transfer price (from margin matrix)' description (line 206)
Frontend_BillingTab_Entry_Labels.note: Labels only render when settlements exist - verified in code

verified: computeTP function reads settlement.total_at_transfer_price with fallback (line 101)
